code:
import io
import string
import list

let line = io.read_line()
match line
when Some(s)
  let parts = string.split_whitespace(s)
  mut sums: List<Int> = []
  mut total = 0
  mut i = 0
  while i < parts.len()
    match parts.get(i)
    when Some(p)
      match string.parse_int(p)
      when Some(n)
        total = total + n
        sums = list.push(sums, total)
      when None
        ()
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  mut out = ""
  mut j = 0
  while j < sums.len()
    match sums.get(j)
    when Some(v)
      if j == 0
        out = "#{v}"
      else
        out = "#{out} #{v}"
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    j = j + 1
  end
  println(out)
when None
  println("")
end
